eng.definition: a person who dislikes humankind and avoids human society.
examples: The old man was a notorious misanthrope who avoided social gatherings.
Despite being a misanthrope, he was respected for his scholarly work.
His misanthropic attitudes have isolated him from others.
मेरे बाल्य के दिन बहुत ही आनंददायक थे।
बाल्य जीवन का सबसे महत्वपूर्ण हिस्सा होता है।
उन्होंने अपने बाल्य के बारे में बताया।
